data.body: EPIC LANDED. All 14 stories closed + completion-verifier-signed. The 13-code-commit Gerrit stack (changes 325 327 328 329 332 333 334 335 339 340 341 342 343) passed LLM-Review+MAX AND Verified+MAX and was submitted (top change 343) — all MERGED to main. Rebased onto newest main (8e35bc70b, which removed the fragile import-cycle guard). Flake observed + filed as bug vocal-dip-robin (edf7, discovered_from this epic): test_guard_counts_only_direct_children_not_unrelated intermittent git-race (could not parse HEAD / index.lock) in its temp-store fixture — cleared by recheck each time, unrelated to epic content. Also fixed RTK pytest exemption (transparent_prefixes) so sessions don't need rtk proxy.
